summary: Assert that every sample of a resource is finite. Any NaN/Inf fails the assertion and records the non-finite count, the worst (first) non-finite pixel, and a capped list of non-finite pixel locations.

inputs.name: resource
inputs.doc: The resource whose samples must all be finite.

outputs.name: report
outputs.doc: The assertion verdict: pass/fail plus the non-finite count, worst pixel, and locations.

params.name: severity
params.doc: How a violation affects the run: `error` fails the run, `warning` marks the evidence, `metric` never fails.
